message:
feat: user-facing auto-repair diagnostics after extension loading (bd-k5q5.8.11)

After loading extensions, drain repair events and emit structured tracing
events for each repair. Default: info-level summary with pattern counts.
Set PI_AUTO_REPAIR_VERBOSE=1 for per-extension detail on stderr.

Also adds #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on enable_extensions_with_policy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
